name: CodeGeeX (13B)
license: Apache-2.0 (code); custom Model License for weights (free research use; commercial use after registration)
archDisplay: Dense autoregressive Transformer (GPT-style, trained w/ GLM recipe)
note: 13B multilingual code model covering 23 programming languages; introduced HumanEval-X benchmark (KDD 2023).

results.notes: CodeGeeX-13B MBPP Pass@1, 3-shot setting (paper Table 11, Appendix A.4.2). The same table also reports a 1-shot setting result of Pass@1=24.37; I picked the 3-shot figure as it matches the standard MBPP paper convention.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via GitHub README (13B params, Apache-2.0 code license + separate MODEL_LICENSE for weights, max sequence length 2,048 = ctxK 2) and arXiv:2303.17568 HTML (Table 5: HumanEval-X Python pass@1 = 22.89% exact match). Paper accepted at KDD 2023 (Aug 2023, Long Beach) but model itself pretrained/released by Zhipu in Sept 2022, consistent with record. No changes made.
